series_metadata.series_title: Licensed MF Dealers Tax Reports/Supporting Schedules
series_metadata.series_description: Monthly tax report & supporting schedules submitted by fuel dealers. Reports are a complete recap of all fuel distribution activity during the month. Forms included: MF2, MF2 1, MF 2 2, MF 2A, MF 2B, MF 2C, MF 2D, MF 2F, MF 2G

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 4 years after the expiration of the calendar year in which received, then destroy. ; Electronic: 4 years after the expiration of the calendar year in which received, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
